══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Simic Hybrid — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Simic Hybrid — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Simic Hybrid — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Simic Hybrid — Armored Tank HP: 35/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Simic Hybrid — Armored Tank --- HP: 35/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
